## Start Flow and Filter Test Runs

parameters.subject: =Automation - Med Order Live - {{ $('Guest Details').item.json.code }}
parameters.message:
=

Hi Team,

The following patient has just finished a "{{ $('When Executed by Another Workflow').first().json.body.data.appointments[0].service_name }}". However their script has not been signed. Please confirm if we are required to proceed.

Name: {{ $('Guest Details').item.json.personal_info.first_name }} {{ $('Guest Details').item.json.personal_info.last_name }}
Code: {{ $('Guest Details').item.json.code }}
Center: {{ $('Guest Details').item.json.center_name }}

Profile URL: Open Patient Profile
Script URL: Open Script

Regards,
Automation

nodes.name: Send message and wait for response
